name: A.Plus Group Holdings Limited
summary: A.Plus Group Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides financial printing services under the A.Plus brand in Hong Kong. The company primarily offers typesetting, design, translation, printing, and delivery services related to financial reports, company announcements, shareholder circulars, debt offering circulars, IPO prospectuses, and fund documents. It also engages in the design, production, and standalone translation of various types of reports, newsletters, leaflets, brochures, etc. The company was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Sheung Wan, Hong Kong. A.Plus Group Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Brilliant Ray Global Limited.
